summary: Iteration 15 - Major refactoring for commercial launch. All 21 requested features verified working. Landing page with OLED black design, gradient H1, 3 solution cards, CTA navigation. Multi-tenancy with company_id. Fleet quota management with plan-based limits. Legal footer on all pages. Driver registration blocked.

H1 contains 'Chaque minute, votre trésorerie fuit. Reprenez le contrôle.' (data-testid='hero-h1') - PASS
Hero subtitle text (data-testid='hero-subtitle') - PASS

Solutions section with 3 cards (data-testid='solutions-section', 'card-litiges', 'card-tracking', 'card-eco') - PASS
Footer visible on landing page (data-testid='footer') - PASS

Confidentialité page loads at /confidentialite - PASS
Contact page loads at /contact - PASS
Footer visible on login page - PASS
Footer visible on register page - PASS
If authenticated, / redirects to /dashboard - PASS

Quota bar shows driver count / max and plan name (3 / 15 chauffeurs PLAN CROISSANCE) - PASS
Add driver button exists (data-testid='add-driver-btn') - PASS

Backend: GET /api/auth/company-quota returns driver_count, max_drivers, can_add, plan - PASS
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns company_id and plan fields - PASS
Register page shows 'Transporteur' and 'Client' role options (no 'Chauffeur') - PASS
Driver dashboard regression (driver@test.com / driver123) - PASS (shows 85 Éco-score)
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx: Well-structured OLED black design with gradient H1, metrics band, 3 solution cards, and proper data-testid attributes
Footer.jsx: Reusable component with CGU, RGPD, Contact links and proper data-testid attributes
LegalPages.jsx: CGU, Confidentialité, Contact pages with proper legal content and footer
AuthPages.jsx: Register page correctly shows only 'Transporteur' and 'Client' roles, footer visible on login/register
AdminDashboard.jsx: Driver quota bar shows 'Gestion de Flotte' with X/Y chauffeurs and plan name, progress bar, add driver button
server.py: POST /api/auth/register blocks driver role with 403, GET /api/auth/company-quota returns quota info, GET /api/auth/me returns company_id and plan
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 completed major refactoring for commercial launch. Key features: 1) Landing page at / with OLED black design, gradient H1 'Chaque minute, votre trésorerie fuit. Reprenez le contrôle.', 3 solution cards (litiges, tracking, eco), CTA → /login. 2) Multi-tenancy with company_id on users, filtered queries. 3) Fleet quota: Solo=3, Croissance=15, Flotte Pro=unlimited. Admin plan is 'croissance' (15 max). Quota bar shows '3 / 15 chauffeurs PLAN CROISSANCE'. 4) Legal footer (CGU, RGPD, Contact) on /, /login, /register, /cgu, /confidentialite, /contact. 5) Driver registration blocked (403) - drivers created by admin only. All data-testid attributes present and working.

landing_page.hero_h1: VERIFIED - Contains 'Chaque minute, votre trésorerie fuit. Reprenez le contrôle.'

footer.landing_page: VERIFIED - Footer visible with CGU, RGPD, Contact links

multi_tenancy.company_id_in_auth_me: VERIFIED - GET /api/auth/me returns company_id and plan
multi_tenancy.company_quota_endpoint: VERIFIED - GET /api/auth/company-quota returns driver_count, max_drivers, can_add, plan

fleet_quota.quota_bar: VERIFIED - Shows 'Gestion de Flotte' with '3 / 15 chauffeurs PLAN CROISSANCE'

driver_registration_blocked.register_ui: VERIFIED - Only 'Transporteur' and 'Client' options shown, no 'Chauffeur'

authenticated_redirect.landing_to_dashboard: VERIFIED - Authenticated user at / redirects to /dashboard or /driver
